TextView.android:text: Choose how OrderMate integrates with Clover Register
Display the OrderMate pop up by clicking a button
Use OrderMate Register Instead Of Clover Register
Always display the OrderMate pop up automatically
Choose How You Take Custom Notes
Add & Edit Widgets For Individual Line Items
Add & Edit Widgets For Entire Orders
Choose which widgets appear in the filter pop up
No filterable widgets available.\nEnable widgets in Item Level or Order Level Notes settings.
Create text templates for SMS & E-mail notifications. Available in the "Send Notification pop up"
Send email notification before due date/time
Print kitchen receipt before due date/time
Control where order notes appear on printed receipts
